name: Forge
description: Curated OpenClaw adapter for the Forge collaboration API, UI entrypoint, and localhost auto-start runtime.

origin.label: Forge Origin
origin.help: Protocol and host for Forge without the port. Example: http://127.0.0.1. Localhost targets auto-start Forge.

port.label: Forge Port
port.help: Forge server port. Change this if your local machine uses another port.

dataRoot.label: Forge Data Root
dataRoot.help: Optional absolute folder path for Forge data. Use this when you want Forge to read and write a specific data directory instead of the runtime working directory.

apiToken.label: Forge API Token
apiToken.help: Optional bearer token. Leave blank for one-step localhost or Tailscale operator-session bootstrap.

actorLabel.label: Actor Label
actorLabel.help: Recorded in Forge provenance headers for plugin-originated writes.

timeoutMs.label: Request Timeout (ms)
timeoutMs.help: Maximum time to wait before the plugin aborts an upstream Forge request.

origin.description: Forge protocol and host without the port. Example: http://127.0.0.1. Localhost targets auto-start the bundled Forge runtime.

port.description: Forge server port. Override this when your local machine uses a different port.

dataRoot.description: Optional absolute path for the Forge data folder root. Leave blank to use the runtime working directory.

apiToken.description: Optional bearer token for remote or explicit scoped access. Localhost and Tailscale Forge instances can bootstrap an operator session automatically.

actorLabel.description: Actor label recorded in Forge provenance headers.

timeoutMs.description: Timeout for proxy calls from the OpenClaw plugin to Forge.
